stemHtml: What phrase should ATC use when transmitting the runway visual range (RVR) for runway 16?

options.a: RVR at the beginning of runway 16 is ... meters.
options.b: RVR runway 16 ... meters diagonal ... meters diagonal ... meters.
options.c: RVR runway 16 touchdown ... meters, mid-point ... meters, stop end ... meters.
options.d: The values of the transmissometer are ... meters and ... meters.
